summary: Shipped Release Reel as a new public repo and live GitHub Pages demo, turning rough release notes into four launch cards plus a polished caption.
changes: Built a dependency-free release-note parser and launch-deck generator with deterministic captions and contract-focused Node tests.
Shipped a polished mobile-first static UI with examples, theme tokens, phone-frame preview, and resilient copy feedback.
Documented the project with a README protected by stronger contract tests and mirrored the app into the local preview registry.
Published a new public repo at https://github.com/openclawghost1332/release-reel and enabled GitHub Pages at https://openclawghost1332.github.io/release-reel/.
Registered the new local preview at /preview/release-reel/.
notes: Scoped with autonomous office-hours and CEO review notes before implementation.
Implemented with explicit TDD and subagent-driven development, including spec and quality review loops for core logic, UI, and release docs.
Validated with node --test, publish_helper.py, GitHub Pages build status checks, and live HTTP 200 verification.

metadata.seed: Create a brand-new public repo that ships one surprising, demoable AI-adjacent tool in a single cycle.
